dict.string:
KV4P/ATL Source Code Notice
Developed by Blake Ross WX4ATL
This app and its companion BLE firmware overlay are distributed under the GNU General Public License, version 3 or later (GPL-3.0-or-later).
For any public binary release, the complete corresponding source is published at:
https://github.com/WX4ATL/KV4P-ATL
The source repository contains the KV4P/ATL app, firmware overlay, web flasher, build scripts, exact firmware build instructions, notices, and upstream KV4P source version used for the release.
Do not distribute public app or firmware binaries until that repository is public and contains the corresponding source for the exact released build.
This software is provided without warranty, to the extent permitted by law.
